title: habenaria busseana
intro: Habenaria busseana, also known as Busse's orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Habenaria busseana include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant's aerial parts are used in herbal preparations, often in the form of infusions or decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties.
